body:
## Problem

MetalForge has VideoObject JSON-LD on ~157 lick pages + 63 drummer profiles (VideoObject shipped in #1010/#183). But there is no dedicated video sitemap — just the main sitemap.xml.

Google's Video Pack and Video search require a video sitemap (/api/video-sitemap.xml using the video: namespace) for maximum eligibility. Without it, Google must discover video metadata from JSON-LD alone, which is less reliable.

Pages with VideoObject JSON-LD that should appear in the video sitemap:
- /drummers/<slug>/licks/<lick-slug> (157 pages) — have VideoObject with YouTube URL, name, description, thumbnailUrl
- /drummer/<slug> profile pages (63 pages) — have VideoObject for profile YouTube embeds

## Fix

Create: api/video-sitemap.js (new Vercel serverless function)

Pattern mirrors api/sitemap.js but generates video:sitemap XML:

  <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
  <urlset xmlns='http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9'
          xmlns:video='http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-video/1.1'>
    <url>
      <loc>https://metalforge.io/drummers/joey-jordison/licks/the-heretic-anthem-drum-intro</loc>
      <video:video>
        <video:thumbnail_loc>https://img.youtube.com/vi/[videoId]/mqdefault.jpg</video:thumbnail_loc>
        <video:title>The Heretic Anthem Drum Intro — Joey Jordison (Slipknot)</video:title>
        <video:description>Learn Joey Jordison's iconic drum lick...</video:description>
        <video:content_loc>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=[videoId]</video:content_loc>
        <video:publication_date>2026-01-01</video:publication_date>
      </video:video>
    </url>
    ...
  </urlset>

Add to vercel.json rewrites: { src: '/video-sitemap.xml', dest: '/api/video-sitemap' }
Reference from api/robots.js: Video-Sitemap: https://metalforge.io/video-sitemap.xml

Data source: SIGNATURE_LICKS (imported in sitemap.js) has videoId per lick.

## Expected count
~220 video URL entries (157 lick pages + 63 drummer profiles with YouTube embeds)

## Estimated organic uplift
- Google Video Pack eligibility for lick pages (VideoObject already present — sitemap unlocks discovery)
- Video search carousel impressions for 'joey jordison drum lick', 'blast beat tutorial', etc.
- Compounds with #1347 (lick pages VideoObject in SSR)

## Verify
1. /video-sitemap.xml is accessible and returns valid XML
2. XML validates against Google's video sitemap spec
3. At least 10 lick page <url> entries with <video:video> child nodes
4. robots.txt references Video-Sitemap
5. Submit to GSC as a secondary sitemap

## Done
When /video-sitemap.xml is live, valid, and referenced from robots.txt.
title: SEO: Dedicated video sitemap (/api/video-sitemap.xml) for Google Video Pack eligibility
